Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.

JSON5L combines the relaxed JSON5 dialect (comments, unquoted/single-quoted keys, trailing commas, relaxed numbers) with JSONL's newline-delimited framing (one document per line).

This package provides Json5lSerializer and Json5lParser. The serializer emits strict RFC-8259 JSON per line by default (byte-identical to JsonlSerializer), with an opt-in for JSON5 sugar. The parser accepts the full JSON5 dialect per line — and, because JSON5 is a strict superset of JSON, plain JSONL input as well.

Example:

// Serialize a list of beans to JSON5L String json5l = Json5l.of(myList); // Parse JSON5L back to a list List<MyBean> list = Json5l.to(json5l, List.class, MyBean.class);

See Also:

    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    Json5lConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties for REST classes and methods using JSON5L.
    Json5lConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @Json5lConfig annotation.
    Json5lConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies Json5lConfig annotations to a JsonParser.Builder.
    Json5lConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies Json5lConfig annotations to a JsonSerializer.Builder.
    Json5lParser
    Parses JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) input into POJO models.
    Json5lParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    Json5lParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Json5lParser.
    Json5lParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    Json5lSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to JSON5L (JSON5 Lines).
    Json5lSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    Json5lSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Json5lSerializer.
    Json5lSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    Json5lTokenReader
    Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the JSON5L format.
